tasks.title: Check for regression issues
tasks.summary:
Kids planner task promoted from DreamVault candidate audit. This is a safe
  QA/documentation/verification mission where the kid supervises an AI agent,
  reviews the output, and records proof.
tasks.why_it_matters:
These tasks turn DreamVault maintenance into supervised, copy-paste-ready
  missions. The kid does not need to code directly; they manage the agent,
  verify the result, and submit proof.
tasks.agent_prompt:
You are working in the DreamVault repo.

  Mission title:
  Check for regression issues

  Source reference:
  docs/GUI_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md

  Task:
  Help complete this QA/documentation/verification task safely.

  Rules:
  - Do not use secrets, tokens, credentials, billing accounts, or private keys.
  - Do not deploy to production.
  - Do not delete files.
  - Do not perform live trading or brokerage actions.
  - Prefer read-only inspection, tests, documentation updates, and clear reports.
  - If code changes are needed, explain them first and keep them small.
  - Produce copy-paste-ready commands or file edits.
  - End with a proof summary the kid can paste into the planner.

  Acceptance:
  - The task result is clear and reviewable.
  - Any tests/checks are listed.
  - Any changed files are listed.
  - No risky actions were taken.
  - Proof is provided as a short closeout.
acceptance_criteria: No secrets, billing, destructive repo actions, deploys, or live trading are required
The kid can supervise the AI agent using the included prompt
The task produces a clear proof summary
Any file changes are small and reviewable
Any test or verification output is recorded
proof_required: Short summary of what was checked or updated
Files changed, if any
Test or verification output, if any
Agent closeout message
